data.body:
## Description

**What**: Remove issue_tracker.create_cmd config key and its dead code from hooks, remove v2 .tickets entry from review-gate-allowlist.conf, remove issue_tracker.create_cmd from validate-config.sh known keys list.
**Why**: The config key is read but never used (dead code), and the allowlist entry is for a directory that no longer exists.
**Scope**:
- IN: pre-bash-functions.sh (remove _CREATE_CMD variable, _CREATE_CMD_FROM_ENV, and config read lines 173-180), dso-config.conf (remove issue_tracker.create_cmd line), review-gate-allowlist.conf (remove v2 .tickets entry and comment, keep v3 entry), validate-config.sh (remove issue_tracker.create_cmd from known keys)
- OUT: Scripts (story 1), docs (story 4), tests (story 5)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, no issue_tracker.create_cmd config key exists in dso-config.conf, validate-config.sh, or hook code. Satisfies: No issue_tracker.create_cmd config key or its associated dead code exists anywhere
- When this story is complete, v2 .tickets entry is removed from review-gate-allowlist.conf while v3 entry is preserved. Satisfies: No references to v2 ticket directory remain in active code
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] _SEARCH_CMD in pre-bash-functions.sh IS used (lines 255, 275) — only remove _CREATE_CMD and its config read, not the search command
